base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_screen_fade — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 final fantasy. Title screen 'FINAL FANTASY' logo + intro-scroll fade variants (1034×906 sheet has 4 sequential fade-in frames). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
